description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a variety of trees and shrubs, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. A spacious patio area is visible, complete with outdoor seating and a swimming pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and relaxation. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional spaces. The arrangement of windows and doors is asymmetrical, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic of the bungalow.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a landscaped yard featuring a swimming pool and various trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and the asymmetrical arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard, large windows, and additional greenery surrounding the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, outdoor seating, and the continuation of the landscaped garden.
